proven.claim: PROVEN: has_equality = 1 implies at least one assertion matched the equality pattern.
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P1
; LINE: 113
; PROVEN: has_equality = 1 implies at least one assertion matched the equality pattern.
; Strategy: assert preconditions + transitions, then negate the property → expect unsat.
(declare-const asserts_length Int)
(declare-const match_count_equality Int)
(declare-const has_equality Int)
; Code transition: guard asserts.length !== 2 already passed
(assert (= asserts_length 2))
; Code transition: match count is bounded by array length
(assert (>= match_count_equality 0))
(assert (<= match_count_equality asserts_length))
; Code transition: Array.some return-value semantics
(assert (=> (= match_count_equality 0) (= has_equality 0)))
(assert (=> (> match_count_equality 0) (= has_equality 1)))
; Negate the property: has_equality = 1 but no assertion matched
(assert (= has_equality 1))
(assert (= match_count_equality 0))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: VIOLATION: asserts.some returns false (0) without throwing.
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 113
; VIOLATION: asserts.some returns false (0) without throwing.
; Contract says: must throw if condition does not hold.
; Strategy: model actual code transitions + violation condition → expect sat.
(declare-const asserts_length Int)
(declare-const match_count_equality Int)
(declare-const has_equality Int)
(declare-const did_throw Int)
; Code transition: guard passed, exactly 2 assertions in the array
(assert (= asserts_length 2))
; Code transition: match_count bounded by array length
(assert (>= match_count_equality 0))
(assert (<= match_count_equality asserts_length))
; Code transition: Array.some binds return value to 0 when no match found
(assert (=> (= match_count_equality 0) (= has_equality 0)))
(assert (=> (> match_count_equality 0) (= has_equality 1)))
; Code transition: Array.prototype.some never throws — did_throw is permanently 0
(assert (= did_throw 0))
; Violation: condition holds false (no equality match) yet no exception was raised
(assert (= has_equality 0))
(assert (= did_throw 0))
(check-sat)
